description: Markdown memory for AI agents. Files you can read, edit, grep, and commit. Not a database.
name: io.github.xultrax-web/agent-memory-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to a custom memory storage directory. Overrides the default per-project location.
environmentVariables.name: AGENT_MEMORY_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'global' to store memories in ~/.agent-memory/ instead of the per-project default ./.agent-memory/.
environmentVariables.name: AGENT_MEMORY_SCOPE

environmentVariables.description: Log level: debug | info | warn | error. Defaults to info. Logs go to stderr (won't pollute MCP stdio).
environmentVariables.name: AGENT_MEMORY_LOG
